submitted_payload.toolTagline: Free open-source AI coding workflow with plan-build-verify loops
submitted_payload.toolDesc: Free open-source workflow for developers doing repo work: planning, implementation, and verification in one reviewable overnight coding loop.

verification.execution_method: headless browser form submission after the site’s own security checkpoint completed in-browser

why_this_action: The May 23, 2026 workflow audit still shows Codeberg adoption flat, so another executable directory lane is higher leverage than more drafting.

The Toolify presents itself as a coding-category AI tools directory with a public submit surface and self-reported 48k+ monthly visitors, which is stronger than most low-traffic long-tail directories.
It was not yet present in outreach-log.md, so this expands distribution instead of duplicating an in-flight lane.
The listing path preserves Codeberg as the primary destination and keeps GitHub as mirror-only context.
expected_outcome: Qualified developers discover Ralph Workflow through a fresh coding-directory lane that points directly to the primary Codeberg repo.
replacement_condition: If there is no live The Toolify listing or referral evidence by 2026-06-06, treat this as pending-only and spend the next fresh-action slot on a different untouched executable lane or a sharper conversion surface.
